title: /status emits scaled ints under spec float key names
description: lichen/subsys/lichen/coap/coap_status.c:275-276,316-322. spec/11-lci.md §17.5.3 payload contract: duty_cycle_pct 2.3, snr_db 7.5, etx 1.2 (floats). Code emits x10-scaled integers under the same key names (duty_cycle_pct 23, snr_db 75, etx 12) — a spec-compliant client decodes values 10x off (75 dB SNR). Fix: encode CBOR floats (half/float32) per spec, or rename keys and document the scaled profile in the spec.
